summary.en: Chinese AI startup with strong long-context and reasoning capabilities.
summary.zh: 中国 AI 初创公司，具备强大的长上下文和推理能力。

title.en: Moonshot AI API Key - Kimi Long Context Models | Get Model Key
title.zh: 月之暗面 API Key - Kimi 长上下文模型 | Get Model Key

description.en: Get Moonshot AI API key for Kimi models. Access long-context AI with strong reasoning capabilities.
description.zh: 获取月之暗面 API Key，访问 Kimi 模型。使用具备强大推理能力的长上下文 AI。

benefit.en: New users can usually receive about CNY 15 in starter credit, often with real-name verification required (subject to official policy).
benefit.zh: 新用户通常可获得约 15 元体验额度，一般需实名（具体以官方规则为准）。

notes.en: Excellent long-context handling, making it a strong option for long-document reading and webpage summarization in OpenClaw workflows.
notes.zh: 长文本处理能力突出；在 OpenClaw 中做长文档阅读、网页总结这类任务时，Kimi 通常是稳妥选择。
